reviews.text: Terrible experience with this law firm. Treated me and my partners poorly. They should be ashamed of themselves! We will never do business with them again.
Great law firm, very supportive and helped me through a difficult time in my life. Thank you!
Experts.

I feel so lucky to have met Jonathan A. Thorsness. He’s honest, patient, transparent and true to his word. When I met Jonathan he said , “ I love what I do.” I believe that to be true. He was very kind, answered all my questions and fees were reasonable.

Jonathan let me know that my previous lawyer had charged me $3,000 for a $1227 surety bond. If you’ve ever dealt with a dishonest lawyer, you’ll know how great it is to find an honest one. I was also relieved to know that Jonathan is from a family practice that’s been around for some decades. Lillig & Thorsness is definitely a law firm that I trust. Get in touch with Jonathan Thorsness if you need a great probate lawyer or estate planner. I can’t recommend him enough. Your in good hands with Jonathan!

I highly recommend the Botti Law Firm.  Attorney Jean Lasics Wessels successfully handled my complex financial matters, with expertise and empathy. She kept me informed every step of the process and she fought hard for me. I appreciate the Botti Law Firm’s dedication to my case.

John Botti and Botti Law Firm helped me through one of the most difficult times of my life. My kids mean everything to me, and John was able to secure a fair custody agreement in spite of dealing with extreme bias towards Father's in DuPage. He was able finalize my divorce, even during a pandemic when courts and other institutions were being shut down, and didn't financially over-burden me so I could be free to purchase a new home for my kids and start a new life. Thank you!

Update: I asked Botti Law to look at a potential defamation case. It took them 8 weeks and they are now trying to charge me $6750 dollars for a legal opinion that would have amounted to reading emails and making a phone call. Fine for family law--but avoid for everything else.

I have worked with Botti Law Firm for many years due to different circumstances with my divorce/custody case. Aldo Botti, John Botti, and Jean Lasics-Wessels have been absolutely amazing. Divorce is a very difficult process - especially when it involves children.  They definitely prioritize what is best for their clients. I do not believe the outcomes would have been as positive for my family and me if I was represented by anyone else. In addition, their communication is excellent and their billing is extremely fair. I would highly recommend Botti Law Firm. Everyone at the firm is exceptional.

I switched attorneys to work with Mike Botti, and it was the best decision I made. He immediately identified issues in my previous divorce paperwork, corrected them, and guided me toward the best possible outcome given my situation. Mike is the kind of lawyer who genuinely wants the best for his clients- he’s thorough, diligent, and gets things done the right way.

His strong relationships within DuPage County and his positive reputation were clear throughout the process. I’m incredibly grateful for how he wrapped up my divorce while prioritizing both my kids’ best interests and mine. I can’t thank him enough and highly recommend him to anyone who needs a trustworthy, effective attorney!
John the paralegal assistant was very helpful on phone. I had a traffic concern and they were more than eager to assist. I'd recommend using this firm for any traffic concerns.
Do not recommend.
Do not recommend
Thank you for the resources and insight!

My experience with Mike Botti has been absolutely amazing. He jumped in later into my divorce, and he has been dedicated to every step of the process, and the outcome has been so much better than I ever imagined it to turn out. My divorce seemed to be easy, but it was difficult because of the relationship, and Mike has been very patient, strategic, positive, and effective with every step. He just made everything look so easy, and it felt like bliss. Mike was always available on the phone and email when I needed him. He was always on time in court and always kind and respectful with everyone. I feel so blessed to have found Mike and to have trusted him with this very important transition for my family with young children. I absolutely love working  with Mike. And I am so grateful for everything that he achieved for my family. Thank You, Mike!
Great experience all around! If you need a lawyer, look no further!

I’ve used this firm on multiple occasions both civil and criminal. They have always advised properly and the end result always played well for me, and I’m just not lucky even though I own a horseshoe. When at the table choose Botti law firm as the play.
Absolutely the most helpful lawyer I've talked to. Super friendly and informative.

My experience with John Botti over the years has been nothing short of exceptional.  It's unusual to find a knowledgeable divorce attorney who also has a heart of gold.  I would truly trust John with my most delicate issues - indeed I have, and I knew I was in good hands.

I have been dealing with a divorce battle for 5 years now and John has always been the voice of reason.  He is a team player and listens with compassion to every nuance of a case.  He takes the time to listen to you and makes sure all of your questions are answered.  He worked tirelessly to provide the advice and support I needed during this difficult time.

I would not hesitate for a second to highly recommend John to anyone in need of an attorney.  You would be lucky to have him on your team!

Our family has been so thankful to have Mike Botti as our lawyer. We have been using him for many years for all of our legal matters. He is always so  professional, knowledgeable, helpful, and supportive. He is someone we can depend on and trust. Mike will put in the extra time to explain and counsel us when we need it, and never makes us feel like we are rushed. We would recommend his services to anyone looking for an excellent and honest lawyer. We will continue using him for any future needs.

I was truly blessed to work with Mike Botti on my divorce and custody case. When Mike stepped into my case, I felt such relief because from the get-go I knew I could trust him completely. Mike was a professional - always early to the court room and respectful in front of the judge. Mike had a firm handle on my case, was always up-to-date on all the details, and he knew exactly what was important to me and drove the case to accomplish that without letting up. I found Mike to be confident, compassionate and incredibly smart - he was ready at the drop of a hat to change courses or adjust in order to come to what was the best outcome - nothing ruffled him. He was responsive to both calls and email. During my case, Mike never wasted my time or money. He was always willing to explain things and strategize. I honestly cannot say enough good things about my experience of having Mike Botti be my attorney. I have already recommended him to friends and will continue to recommend him to everyone I meet who needs an attorney.
I was fortunate to secure the services of John Botti to facilitate my divorce. I would recommend him for his honest, patient counsel.

In my decision to use this Law Firm, I had the opportunity to work with Jean.  She was not only professional but very respectful of my time.  I was able to ask questions and get answers in a timely fashion.  Jean helped me with a few issues and I will continue to reach out to her and refer her to friends.

Mike Botii is someone you can depend on and is always ready to step up to the plate. He is committed,  confident and determined to get the job done.Mike is someone who truly cares and who has a heart of gold

I was referred to the Botti Law firm by one of my friends. She told me to ask for Aldo Botti, and she highly recommended him for his professionalism and experience. When I first met Aldo he introduced me to John Botti his son and told me that he will be handling me case. Over the time while dealing with John through a painful divorce, it was clear to me that the apple doesn’t fall far from the tree. John guided me from start to finish, presenting me with all possibilities to get through the process as painlessly as possible. He was highly professional and knowledgeable. The assistance I received from him was excellence. Any minor issues that came up was dealt with quickly and to my best interest. The entire process was explained in detail and I received prompt replies to my emails and phone calls. He does go above and beyond for his clients.  He was frank about the strengths and weaknesses of my case and has been super helpful and patient with me. He treated me with such care and made sure I knew exactly everything I needed to know since I come from different culture. He was an absolute pleasure to work with during a difficult time. The level of communication he provided during the entire process along with his advocacy for me was unparalleled. Great care and concern for me as a client and as a person. The firm is not one of the high-pressure attorneys that charge you for everything! They are honest and caring. I am very happy with him. I absolutely gained an excellent attorney to my case and a wonderful friend. Can't thank him enough!

Rehab Badreldin
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Rehab. It was a pleasure working with you. Through it all, you showed strength, courage and kindness. You are a great mom and great example to your kids.  - John Botti

reviews.text: Ethan is an amazing attorney with great strategy, compassion and patience.
Called twice. Was told we’d get a call back. Never came. Don’t waste your time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Liz C - thank you for your feedback. We make every effort to respond to calls from potential clients, though at times the volume of calls can lead to some delay. In any event, we have no record of a call from Liz C. To the extent we missed your message, we encourage you to try again so we can make sure the intake process is started.

reviews.text: Ethan since day one during the intake he took the time and explained the process & different routes my case can go. He speaks the truth and responds on a timely manner! I definitely recommend his firm! Very great full through this journey and victory!

My experience working with Ethan White on a severance case was outstanding.  He listened well and communicated clearly.   He demonstrated maturity and expertise as he guided me through all phases of negotiation. Our final outcome was far superior to an initial offer provided.  In addition to his legal skills, his customer service is outstanding.  He is a pleasure to work with.  One of the things I also appreciate about Ethan is his efficiency--he always respected my time.  I wholeheartedly recommend Ethan White and Emery Law to other clients.

We retained Ethan at Emery Law to help negotiate a better severance agreement. Not only did Ethan succeed in representing us to acquire a much better severance than the company first offered, he was easy to work with while providing excellent guidance. Ethan was patient, while having the right mix of firmness with the other lawyer involved. I would highly recommend Ethan and Emery law firm.
Emery Law is great! Ethan White knew exactly what to do and handled my case professionally, quick and easy. I highly recommend.

If you’re looking for great representation Ethan White is fantastic! I did extensive research in finding Ethan and his firm. He will take the time upfront to go over your situation and tell you if it’s something he can assist with. He will be upfront and honest with you on possible comes and expectations so that you can make the best decision for you situation. He was very knowledgeable, quick to respond and respectful. I was very blessed to have him on my side. If you’re reading this review and finding it hard to make a decision reach out to his office the consultation is free and he will explain if he can or can’t take your case. When put in a position where you need to seek legal counsel Ethan is who you want on your side.

Let’s start with the fact that they are amazing at what they do. The lawyers ( I worked with Ethan white) are very thorough and very knowledgeable. Their communication and response time is great. They make sure you get your time and moneys worth. I had approached them for a employment related legal issue. Since my case was with a bigger company Ethan never discouraged me. He advised me on things that were possible and how we can go about it . We were able to wrap it in a very short amount of time . I would highly recommend Ethan and Emery law firm in general to anyone who seeks legal help.

I had a very small case, which several firms were not willing to take but Attorney Ethan White did. He demonstrated a strong knowledge of the Illinois and Federal employment laws, empathy for my case and patience. Ethan communicated every step of the process effectively and answered my questions thoroughly. I hope to never go through the process of suing an employer again but if I do, I know who I will be contacting.

I reached out to Attorney White of Emery Law, Ltd for advice on an employment matter.  He took the time to understand the situation fully and even highlighted some issues that I had not thought of.  He asked all the right questions and built a solid plan forward to assist me.  He kept me abreast of latest developments in real time and made a very stressful situation less stressful.  I would highly recommend the services of Attorney Ethan White and Emery Law, Ltd.

I hired Ethan to represent me in an employment discrimination case. He took the time to thoroughly understand the facts of the case and always responded to my questions in a timely, thoughtful manner.  He was highly prepared for all meetings and appearances. With Ethan's hard work, we won a settlement on my behalf. I highly recommend him.

I had a very difficult case being terminated by an employer in an “at will” state. But I really felt that I had a good retaliation case. I called several employment attorneys and I couldn’t find anyone that would even listen to me. Then I called Emery Law. Ethan White was the first attorney to truly listen to me and ask questions and try to understand what happened in my situation. He took on my case and not only fought for me, but believed in me. He wasn’t afraid to go up against a large corporation, and he brought my case to a resolution that I was very happy with. I highly suggest him to anyone
I recently used Emery Law for an employment matter and was very happy with the quality of their work.  They were quick and their pricing was reasonable.  I would use again for any employment matters.
I tracked it twice to them with no response or call back

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Mrs. Brisco as it is a pleasure having you as a client.

reviews.text: Amazing attorney, he really makes sure you’re happy with the outcome of your case. Highly recommend! Andi works hard and is very dedicated to his clients!

I hired Andy to represent me in my first DUI  charge because of his expert analysis of the facts and cross examination skills, I was able to recieve the outcome that I wanted and maintain a clean record. I would definitely want Andy in my corner if I found myself in this situation again.

Andy has navigated a situation for our family where a state trooper brought an unjustified case after a traffic stop. From first consult to  the case dismissal he was always very responsive, respectful and detail oriented. Highly recommend his services to anybody.

Highly Respected and Trustworthy Attorney

I highly recommend Andy 's legal services.
Andy is an experienced attorney, knowledgeable, reliable, honest, personable and delivers results.
Andy was able to get my 16 yr old daughter's first traffic ticket dismissed.
Could not have asked for anything more from Andy!

I hired Andy to navigate me through my second DUI charge. He is an expert in DUI/DWI and helped put me at ease throughout the process. Many attorneys will take your money and just show up, but Andy will try everything he can to get you the best possible outcome. I feel like he truly cares for his clients. Before I accepted a final plea in the courtroom, he took me aside me and gave me his honest feedback for my case. Because of his persistence, I was able to get a better outcome. I would certainly hire Andy again, but I hope I never have to!

Attorney Andy is an expert in DUI defense. His experience is unparalleled; he is extremely dedicated and has built a reputation for excellence through years of hands-on litigation and client advocacy. Andy combines deep knowledge of DUI law with defense strategies, including forensic analysis, field sobriety test challenges, and cross-examination of arresting officers. His dedication to continued learning and care for the justice system  sets him apart as a true leader in his field.

Tonight, Andy donated his time to spreading words of encouragement, enthusiasm, and support to the IUN Pre-Law Club. His words meant so much to our club, and provided us with so much insight on what our futures could possibly look like as attorneys. Andy instilled a piece of wisdom and reality into each of us tonight that will, without a doubt, be carried on throughout our lives. We can not thank you enough, Andy :)
Great lawyer! Highly recommended

A. Andy Sotiropoulos lived up to his reputation. I researched and talked to as many lawyers as I could, and then got to talk to Mr. Sotiropoulos. On our first phone call, I found that he was the first one who had the grit to help me out of my very bad situation. His experience, knowledge and extensive credentials were on full display when it came time for trial, on a moment's notice. His keen eye for detail on procedural details, in both officer related mistakes, and prosecutorial missteps, that most likely would have been overlooked by other lawyers, got us a not guilty verdict on my most serious charge. He pulled off a miracle that saved my livelihood. His courtroom performance was on the level of what you would see only on tv. I highly recommend him, and would definitely call on him again if I found myself in trouble. Of course I hope never to have to call him again, unless it is to thank him for his help.
Great attorney would highly recommend. Thank you for handling my case. The matter was resolved fast without litigation.
Andy did a great job handling my first time DUI, he had my summary suspension overturned and had the DUI dropped to lesser charges resulting in court supervision. Overall a very good deal.
Counselor Sotiropoulas was able to walk us through the process of DUI.  He was calm, knowledgeable and navigated well to clear my wife of a DUI.  We were thankful for his guidance.

Andy Sotiropoulos is a brilliant DUI attorney. He's truly dedicated to making sure that everyone gets a fair trial. Andy is very professional yet down to earth and non-judgemental. He helped me great a fair trail and judgment. Great attorney, easy to work with at a fair rate. I would recommended him to anyone in need of an DUI attorney.

As a DUI substance abuse treatment provider, we regularly work with attorneys who are defending DUI cases in court, as well as helping revoked drivers with license reinstatement. Andy stands out as an exceptional advocate for his clients. He is professional, knowledgeable, and has a thorough understanding of DUI law. He also genuinely cares about his clients, and puts 100 percent into every case.

We always appreciate how responsive and communicative Andy is with our team. He is proactive in following up on reports, ensuring compliance documentation is complete, and keeping his clients informed about the status of their case. It’s clear he is deeply committed to protecting his clients' rights and supporting their long-term success.

We highly recommend Andy Sotiropoulos to anyone facing a DUI charge. He is not only a skilled legal advocate but a true partner in helping individuals move forward in a positive direction.

Andy and his team were PHENOMENAL and on POINT with the handling of my case.
The outcome I received was unbelievably better then expected and for that I am so greatly appreciative!
HIGHLY recommend!!
Thank you again Andy

I am extremely satisfied with my services and highly recommend A. Andy Sotiropoulos & Associates ! He was right on top everything from day one till end. Due to his services and time I am able to move forward with life and make something of myself ! everyone deserve a second chances and because of his great work and dedication I’m so appreciative of thank you Andy sotiropoulos!

Andy let me know from the start that this would be a long journey, but to not worry because he had everything under control. I trusted him and a month after my arrest, I had my license back. Now at the end, I came out without a criminal record all because of his knowledge and help.
ANDY SOTIROPOULOS IS THE BEST LAWYER IN HIS FIELD FOR DUI CASES WE WILL NOT GIVE TEN ( 10 ) STARS WE WILL GIVE TEN THOUSAND ( 10,000 ) STAR REVIEWS EXCELLENT AND KNOWLEDGEABLE !!!
Best experience i had with a lawer

I cannot recommend Andy Sotiropolous highly enough! He successfully helped me beat two DUI cases, and his expertise and dedication were evident every step of the way. Andy is not only highly experienced but also incredibly well-respected in the industry, which became clear from the way he handled my cases with confidence and skill.

He took the time to explain every aspect of the legal process to me, making sure I felt informed and reassured throughout. His attention to detail and ability to navigate complex situations are unmatched. If you’re in need of a criminal defense lawyer who will fight tirelessly for you, Andy is the one to call. I’m so grateful for his hard work and couldn’t have asked for a better outcome!
Got me out of what would have been my 2nd DUI. Reduced to a reckless driving charge. I fully recommend him.
Excellent attorney, exceeded all my expectations! I recommend him to all my friends and family and would definitely use him again if needed 💯
Awesome Lawyer He help me beat my case and get my license back

Andy is one of the most efficient attorneys I have ever met  He is professional and knows I ws his way thru the court system.
He has taken a situation that appeared
Hopeless and navigated thru the court system to a very satisfactory conclusion.
I would definitely recommend Andy to anyone that needs the best attorney available

I highly recommend Andy as a top-tier DUI attorney. From the first meeting, it was clear he was an expert in DUI law and fully dedicated to my family member's case. He kept us informed every step of the way and was always responsive. Thanks to his hard work, my family member achieved the best possible outcome. If you need a skilled and caring lawyer, Andy is the one to choose. 5 stars!

Absolutely an amazing lawyer. He went above and beyond. I would recommend anyone to Andy. He is personally involved in each case, responds to every message, every call, & is extremely knowledgeable. He goes above and beyond. 10/10

I would like to express my sincere gratitude for your professionalism, perseverance, and dedication to your work. Thanks to your knowledge, attention to detail, and confident position in court, I was able to achieve justice and a favorable outcome in my case.

Your support provided me not only with legal protection but also with moral support in a difficult situation. I truly appreciate all the efforts you have made and will always recommend you as a highly skilled professional.

Thank you for your hard work!

Andy is an exceptional attorney who really knows how to fight for his clients.  He handled my wife’s case with professionalism and confidence.  When we faced a tough DUI charge, Andy worked his tail off to challenge the evidence, exposing major issues with the prosecution’s case—including a critical discrepancy in the breathalyzer records.

Thanks to his awesome legal skills and persistence, he got a motion to quash granted, and now our case is all but dismissed.  He kept us informed every step of the way, answered all our questions, and reassured us when things felt uncertain.  His confidence wasn’t just talk, he delivered results.

I’m telling you, If you need a dedicated, knowledgeable, and amazing defense lawyer, Andy is for sure the one to call.  We are beyond grateful for his work and highly recommend him to anyone facing legal trouble!!!
Andy, was prompt, professional, and fair in fees in handling my legal matter.

Andy is an exceptional lawyer. From start to finish, he was highly communicative, efficient, and dedicated to helping me resolve my traffic violation. His intelligence and professionalism shine through, whether he is meeting with you privately or representing you confidently in court. Andy's expertise and demeanor make him stand out, and I would not hesitate to recommend him to anyone in need of top-notch legal representation.
First time with Mia and she will definitely be in mind whenever any legal trouble arises. Great value for the peace of mind.

She is just awesome at what she does .... I had a 12,000 dollar fine for being overweight on my semi truck.... whatever magic words she used to get it reduced to 500 dollars she did it and it has taken a big burden off me and my family back .  Thanks a lot Mia
I have been working with Gene for over 10 years now and I am very pleased with his services. He helped our family with several closings and all of them went smooth and very professional!!!

reviews.ownerResponse: We always try to help everyone with their specific legal matters and treat them like family - thanks for your kind words! Best always, Gene

reviews.text: I would certainly recommend Gene Berkes because he is well known around the community and has the experience to handle multiple levels of law including Real Estate, Personal injury, and can even help you with your Trust/Will.  Give him a call and I can almost assure he will answer the phone if he is not in court.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for your recommendations and referrals over these past thirty-plus years! You're a pillar of the community and I appreciate your support and business advice over the years! Best always, Gene

reviews.text: I can't say enough good things about this office. I've sent multiple business associates to Craig and they've all given me excellent feedback and tremendous appreciation for the referral.  Craig takes care of your business and keeps it moving so you can go on living.  Be like Craig.

Craig is a consummate professional with great insights into business and real estate contracts. His expertise has ensured our business and contracts are rock solid and compliant with local laws. I highly recommend! A++++

Ummmm.  I HIGHLY beg to differ with the previous review.   Mr. Donnelly has represented me in several matters and he is good and EXTREMELY  fair.  And yes, I am African American,  since race was brought up in the previous review.

Mr. Donnelly is a non-trustworthy attorney! He will start out in the beginning, telling you all the good things that he will do for your case and switch up on you and sell you short. He also devalues the pain is suffering of African-Americans! So for all those brothers out there and sisters tiki and do not Show yourself short with Mr. Donald.
Great attorney to work with. His staff were professional and polite. Thank you for your great services.

Upon a referral I had the pleasure of consulting with Mr. Danna. It was apparent that his foresight and knowledge regarding my issue was nothing short of amazing. Watching him in his element was truly remarkable. I left feeling confident beyond measure, knowing that I had found an absolute expert in the matter at hand. The beginning of a great relationship.
Mr. Danna is a brilliant attorney and dependably thorough.
Incredible experience with Mr. Danna! He is the best in his branch! I used his services for eviction. Will definitely used him again.

He will forget who you are but he won’t forget your case. If you are looking for an eviction attorney, make sure you hire him (he is still working on my case but I know he will get my tenant OUT)

Its always hard to find an efficient, honest and reasonable attorney.. Mr. Danna is that...and more!! I am so lucky to have him by my side.
Best Attorney ever, result oriented and very disciplined and honest..
William was the BEST. I highly recommend him.

A couple of days ago we went in for a consultation with Mr. Danna. We were recommended to his office by our real estate attorney as Mr. Danna specializes in evictions only. The office staff is very polite, they were very accommodating with the late appointment that we needed because of work.  When we met with Mr. Danna he explained the whole process clearly and we hired him to proceed with starting the eviction on the occupant at our property that we clearly have a problem with.  They got to the paperwork right away and now we wait for further updates and overall outcome. We will be updating on how the process goes and review accordingly. Keeping our fingers crossed that everything goes smoothly.

Mr. Danna and his staff are great to work with. They are hard working and always have their clients best interest in mind.  I am truly impressed with the services they have provided. Definitely recommend using this law firm.
Great attorney !! Got my worthless tenants out of my property QUICK !! Thank you for the great job !! His staff and paralegal are amazing at what they do 🙌🙌
Polite and easy to talk to

’ve been a real estate broker/owner for 21 years, and Chris Aiello is one of the best attorneys I’ve worked with. A big part of that credit also goes to his sister, Carla, who keeps everything moving as his paralegal.

Chris isn’t your typical attorney — don’t expect a suit and slick sales talk. He’s straightforward, honest, and takes the time to walk you through all the angles. He’s not the kind of lawyer who rushes you off the phone; he wants you to fully understand what’s happening.

Like any busy practice, I’ve seen occasional complaints about responsiveness, especially during the spring market. But that’s true for almost every attorney when the season is at its peak. In my experience, after working with Chris for the past 18 years, issues have been rare and the level of service has consistently been excellent.

I have had the pleasure of working with John and his team for the past few years. They are consistently communicative, incredibly effective, and always make me feel supported throughout the process. Whether navigating complex transactions or simply answering questions along the way, they approach everything with clarity, professionalism, and care. When you work with John, you know you are in good hands and well taken care of!
Thank you for all that you do !  Outstanding work !

John, who works with this law firm sat on my case to evict a tenant for months. Response through email was very sporadic and often multiple messages had to be left on the phone to get a hold of him. In the end, deadlines were missed and despite having clear documented proof of my desires as a client, the case was not filed thus unnecessarily wasting my time while having a property with a non-paying tenants for the foreseable future
I have worked with John Pizinger a few times and he’s always been great.   Everyone there is very professional and friendly.  I will definitely recommend to my family and friends.
Great real estate lawyer .
Great help
I've used Chris and his team for several transactions for the past 10 years. They have done a phenomenal job on all my transactions and would highly recommend them.

Chris and his staff have repeatedly missed the given deadlines they gave me to prepare some legal paperwork for my business. We were on good terms and I was never anything other than kind and patient with them. Something they told me would get done quickly ended up never even getting done. First they apologized and said they were busy. That happened three times over a span of about 2-3 months. Then, they just stopped calling me back. Repeatedly even - about 5 times throughout the process. I even told them I understood they were busy and would really just appreciate a referral. I asked both Chris and Carla on separate occasions. I never heard back from either one of them. As a business owner myself, I would never just not call someone back. I understand everyone gets busy, but no call back ever? Repeatedly and when you’re on good terms with the customer even? Unacceptable and extremely unprofessional. I didn’t give one star because Chris and his staff did a great job for me previous to this experience.

Unfortunately, never spoke to a lawyer and was talked over, given other competitors phone numbers(!?), and felt like I was a burden just calling to get a quote and ask questions about refinance document procedures. Additionally their policy is to first sign all documents and then bring them into their office immediately for review. Took their advice and found Katris Law Group, spoke to a friendly lawyer, was quoted a lower cost and they agreed to MEET AT OUR HOUSE(Covid19) the same time the notary will bring the documents and sit in the cold(November 2020), distanced outside while reviewing the paperwork as we sign them. Katris Law Group - friendly, thoughtful and responsive.  Aiello office staff does deserve the 1 star for the wise advice...

Chris and Carla are amazing! We've used them for real estate closing on two occasions already. They're always on top of it, be it the lender, title company, or other party's attorney. They know the process in and out and are always two steps ahead.
I saw John and he did a few things for me.  Nice firm does good work.

I have used Chris Aiello and John Pizinger for MANY of my client’s Real Estate transactions and they are far superior to any others in the area. Carla and Jill the paralegals are an absolute pleasure to work with as well, always prompt and on time with emails and phone calls. I have personally used them for my own Real estate purchases, as well as trusts and wills. This team is top notch and I will continue to use them as well as refer them!!!
We’ve bought two homes, Chris has done both of our closings. His staff is organized and know what they are doing! Thanks again!
Very efficient staff and always a smooth closing.

When calling to schedule a consultation, the receptionist made false claims that the law firm does not work with business or civil litigation, I told her that I was on the website and it showed what areas of law were the practice & someone was whispering in the ladies ear what to see & it was all attempts just not to record the information I was leaving to schedule, then a random person started dialing numbers while we where talking. Not very professional when they claim they don’t specialize what they advertise on their website

Joe is dedicated to his clients: highly responsive to texts/calls/emails, excellent at communicating, and he clearly keeps his clients' best interests at heart. He is hard working, kind, intelligent, and professional. I highly recommend him.

Mr. Horn’s office did a great job for me. Very professional Christina and Joanne, Helped guide me through the process keeping me informed of everything needed from me and what was to come next. All in all it was a great experience and very successful for me. I’ve already recommended to at least three other of my associates.
10/10 Great representation!

Secondly, when we went to pick up our taxes for review prior to the office filing, we were given a manila folder with our info...along with another couple's information, ALL of their tax and personal information (SSN, W2's, addresses, place of employment etc). When brought to the attention of the paralegal, she admitted to the mistake happening due to both female's having the same first name. When we requested to get all of our original paperwork we submitted returned to us, we were informed it was in the pile for shredding- with OUT the office ever getting our authorization for shredding the information or asking if we wanted it back. Our experience was not great due to their carelessness and little effort to ensure accuracy.

Ultimately, he withdrew from the case at the very first court appearance, leaving my mother without representation. His conduct raises serious ethical concerns, and in our opinion, he took advantage of a vulnerable client.

We believe it is important to warn others: based on our experience, this attorney does not act in good faith, and working with him can be emotionally and financially damaging.

Later we found out the whole thing was fabricated by Dean because he was "too busy" to put our closing on the calendar.  Extremely unprofessional.  It almost cost us our dream home.

One more thing, Frank is such a seasoned veteran... EVERYONE and I MEAN EVERYONE in the courthouse knows him on a first name basis... And his friendly personality seems to go a long way! Walking down with him to receive my bond money from the clerks and accounting department, you can just see all smiles with every single person that deals with him... He not your typical stuck up, coxy, know it all lawyer... He is someone that after all of this has been said and done, I feel I can call a friend. Thank you Frank... you truly saved my life!

PART 1 OF MY REVIEW: I found myself in a very serious situation regarding a felony charge due to an entire family lying to police about an incident. I have never been in any kind of trouble like this before and it was an extremely stressful situations for my family and I. How I originally heard about Frank was actually in county jail, where multiple serious offenders were in lock up with me and they all talked about how great of lawyer he was. This people seemed "VERY" experienced with their own situations so I decided that I would meet with Frank as well as a few other lawyers prior too making my decision on who I would choose. After meeting with multiple lawyers I seen it all... From saying one thing on the phone to completely changing tone on an in person meeting. To others telling me a certain price, seeing my wife's wedding ring, then all a sudden doubling their price. Then I met Frank.... I am a researcher and I have seen some negative reviews regarding Frank online, so I was very weary walking in; in fact it was for this reason he was the last lawyer I decided to visit. Once I met Frank though I have a good read and feel for people and he just gave this certain energy and honest vibe off him to make me want to give him a shot.... He also didn't say some sky rocket price once seeing my wife and I and was truly affordable in the sense of what I felt a case like this should cost. The case extended for OVER A YEAR! I had to show up to court more then 10 times throughout the process. Every time I showed up to court Frank was there to represent me. Every time I began to feel worried and concerned Frank was there to call me the day I sent him the text message just to ease my mind. He was there, held to his word, and he TRULY CARED ABOUT ME AND MY SITUATION, and didn't just see me as a number. There was one hiccup along the way, where Frank called me a week before I was set to go to trial and asked me if I wanted to take the offer to get my felony dropped to a Class A misdemeanor after I have already refused this offer 4 times prior to this. I said to myself "ohhh here we go...." Yet another crooked lawyer who last minute doesn't want to put in the last leg of work that was promised to me.... I'm just another number... Well, the truth to this was Frank actually was just doing his job... Most of us put our selves in the center of our own universes and forget that lawyers have 100's of other clients and cases, and every fine detail of every situation is not possible to remember. I told him NO! WE GO TO TRIAL! And may have told him off a bit over the phone feeling like he was just pushing for the easy out... But I was mistaken... Frank rejected the offer, the trial now less then 5 days a way... and I truly became his TOP PRIORITY over any and everything else in his life. Countless calls, multiple meetings in preparation for the case, on time to trial and READY TO GO! Frank crushed it in court! All the lies that were being told about this family only became more and more apparent through Franks process of questioning. He destroyed the prosecution in so much away that I DID'T EVEN HAVE TO TAKE THE STAND!!!!! 4 witnesses from the prosecution, and not one could keep their story straight from the perfectly executed questions Frank placed upon them... Not even the police officer who testified and committed purgury! And this is very hard to overcome in any instance when it is you vs law enforcement. All in all NOT GUILY VERDICT, all bond money released, all firearms returned; the works! I was extremely impressed through and through.

Frank got me out of a class 4 felony case, possession of 43 Xanax bars. he knew what he had to do in order to help me get through what i was going through. he knew whether or not to take to trial or through negotiations and with him gathering all the information that he needed he got me a deal for 2 years probation, does not got on my record as felony charge, and no community service. Also got me out of a domestic violence case nothing on my record and speeding ticket with nothing on my record. im very blessed to have gotten to know this man

I am putting fingers to the keyboard to bask accolades on attorney Frank Scarpino's performance throughout my DUI encounter.
Frank or one of his staff was always available when I had questions regarding my situation. A fact I found unique compared with other attorneys that I've dealt with in the past. Always punctual and ready to go Frank never let me down. But what really blew me away was when my case was taken to trial. Frank was brilliant his carving style was well rehearsed after 23 years experience doing what those young prosecutors where just getting they're feet wet at. To say it most humbly Frank won my case and saved me months of aggravation. Frank does business professionally while bring a while bringing a human quality to the mix.
Bravo Frank!

My husband and I took a chance on Frank and couldn't have been more satisfied with the results of our decision! Not only was he prompt and professional, he kept us informed on the strategies he would be using to get the case dropped. And with that strategy, my husbands DUI case was dismissed in less than a year! He's a skilled attorney, and personally we wouldn't use nor recommend anyone else to take on the job! Thanks Frank!

I paid him $1000 dollar to start process. He didn't do anything for 6 months. I call him more than 100 times . He never answered . And when he called me back he was starting making excuse that he was busy doing another cases. He took money and I didn't hear anything from him.

reviews.text: My husband hired attorney Frank to represent us against the town of Posen because they wanted to take away a property my husband and I owned there. The town only wanted to pay us $5,000 to keep it. First, the attorney asked for $250 to review the case, then $500 to represent us. He told us the case was practically won, that they were going to pay us the cost of the house and the expenses we had incurred, and that they were going to refund the fees we paid. In the end, he told us there was nothing to be done, that the best thing would be for us to give the property to the town, and he charged us another $500 for the paperwork so Posen could take possession. Now we're still receiving tickets from the town, and he's not answering his phone anymore.

The Kaufman Legal Group was very helpful in preparing our estate planning documents.  We appreciated their insights  and timely service.

My mom and I had the pleasure of working with Brett Kaufman of Kaufman legal group for a probate case. He went above and beyond in handling our case. He's detail oriented, has a lot of patience and was always available to answer your questions he never let us down. It was a great experience for both of us for his kindness and generosity. So if you're looking for an awesome, down to earth Attorney contact Brett Kaufman.👍

I have not worked with this guy but I like him already just by the way he answered to a bad review, he took the time to answer to this lady, the same way she was trying to make him look bad, but let's understand cases are not easy, the other side have lawyers too, fighting for their clients, justice can be blind but it's not fast 😉 😊, if you sue someone make sure it's for the right reason not for easy money

We just completed my son”s guardianship with Brett. 5 plus stars for Brett.   Thankful and grateful for his hard work and dedication to my son’s case. He took the time to answer all questions and did a great job explaining the process. He made us feel comfortable and confident in decisions and options that had to made for our son. Outstanding work, Brett!

My sister and I worked with Brett Kaufman of Kaufman Legal Group to sell the family home that we inherited along with our brother, and we couldn’t have been in better hands. Brett was attentive, knowledgeable, and responsive throughout the entire process. His patience and expertise were exactly what we needed as we navigated multiple offers on the unique property, which was held in a trust that had been created nearly a decade earlier by another lawyer.

Brett’s experience and attention to detail proved invaluable, as he helped us successfully review contracts and reject amendments that were not in our best interest. He helped us navigate the termination of two contracts and later arrive at agreeable terms on the contract that we ultimately accepted. Brett remained professional, patient, and calm even during sometimes contentious negotiations with buyers’ lawyers.

One of the standout benefits of working with a smaller firm like Kaufman Legal Group was the high level of attentiveness we received. Throughout our two-year process of listing, removing the listing, and relisting, Brett remained committed to supporting us in a sale that was not without its challenges given the uniqueness of the property. He was always accessible to answer our questions and willing to meet at convenient times when necessary. Brett listened to us and provided informed, thoughtful guidance every step of the way.

His legal assistant, Maii Rashed, was equally attentive, professional, and kind. Both Brett and Maii were thorough in explaining everything to us, which was especially helpful because this was our first time selling a home.

With Brett’s and Maii’s support, we confidently and successfully sold our family home, securing terms that all of us were happy with. My sister and I highly recommend Brett Kaufman and Kaufman Legal Group for anyone seeking expert legal assistance for real estate matters.

Obtaining guardianship for my Son was something I knew I needed to do. At first, I attempted to do it all on my own but realized right away that it was more work than I thought. I am so happy that I reached out to Brett Kaufman to represent my Son Alex and I. He was always very responsive and explained everything thoroughly.  He kept me up to date as the case moved along. The process was quick and stress free thanks to Brett and his office staff.  I Highly recommend using Kaufman Legal group.

I can’t say enough great things about KAUFMAN LEGAL GROUP, LTD.! After struggling to sell my home and navigate the purchase of a new one on my own, I was overwhelmed with stress and uncertainty. The moment I turned everything over to them, a wave of calm washed over me.

Maii Rashed, the Legal Assistant, felt like my personal advocate throughout the entire process. Her dedication was evident; it truly seemed like she was working exclusively for me, day in and day out. Every question I had was answered promptly, and every concern was addressed with care.

Looking back, I can’t believe I didn’t reach out to Brett Kaufman sooner. His expertise and guidance made all the difference, and I wish I had enlisted their help from the start. I could have saved myself a lot of heartache!

If you’re considering buying or selling a home, do yourself a favor and contact KAUFMAN LEGAL GROUP, LTD. They turned what could have been a tumultuous experience into a smooth and manageable one. Highly recommended!

Bret and Maii are the greatest. Bret’s very down to Earth, and he’ll explain why he thinks things should be a certain way, but if you express interest in wanting to go another route, he listens and doesn’t fight you on it. I definitely recommend Kaufman legal

RUN AWAY if you’re looking for someone who knows the ins and outs of probate court. My family spent thousands of dollars to get wishy-washy advice and false hope. He was attentive until we hired a less expensive lawyer for our house closing, that seemed to be the turning point. We severed the professional relationship after again waiting for 2-3 weeks (not uncommon) for a reply to some questions. After severing the relationship over email and asking for an updated list of charges and the remainder of the retainer back, he CHARGES US $150 to write an email saying he’s disappointed we’ve taken these steps. UNBELIEVABLE.  This was 11 days ago and we have not received the remainder of the retainer back.
reviews.ownerResponse:
It is unfortunate that individuals can leave such nasty and egregious reviews. The complaints they have made lack merit. Over the span of three months, we received over 100 emails from them, as well as met with them in-person and had numerous conference calls with the family.

We explained to them multiple times that their probate case was being independently administered, and continuous updates were neither available nor necessary. In every case we take, we try to be mindful of our billable hours to minimize unnecessary fees or costs. Probate cases follow a process, and they do not move at a pace that allows for daily or even weekly updates.

Nevertheless, they wanted everything done immediately. Our approach to their case, as with all our cases, is guided by the legal realities of the situation. We do not pursue actions without a legal basis merely to create the appearance of activity. Our responsibility is to protect our clients’ interests within the legal framework, not to engage in unnecessary confrontations for the sake of appearing proactive.

These clients were the children and ex-wife of the deceased and wanted the executor of the will, the deceased’s current wife, to be removed as the administrator because they felt she was not acting fast enough or providing them with updates. Keep in mind, letters of office were issued in April of 2024 and when they terminated our relationship in August of 2024, the claims period was not set to expire until November of 2024. No distributions could even be made before then, demonstrating their lack of understanding of the legal process and their refusal to listen to my advice. We believe their dissatisfaction comes from ignoring our advice, believing they knew better, and then being unhappy with the results, despite our efforts to present them with clear options and recommendations.

They also remain ignorant of a joint tenancy issue that arose during the sale of a house held in joint tenancy. We explained multiple times that the divorce between the ex-wife and the deceased did not render the joint tenancy deed null and void. The fact that only the ex-wife was required to sign the warranty deed, and other closing documents, further confirmed my contention that the joint tenancy remained intact post-divorce. Had the joint tenancy been severed, the house could not have been sold with just the ex-wife’s signature, and the deceased’s estate would have been required to sign all relevant documents, including the warranty deed. They also decided to involve another firm to handle the real estate closing on joint tenancy house which was not only insulting, but it also unnecessarily complicated the matter, and lead to an unfavorable outcome that we warned could happen. This was just another example of them disregarding our advice and then being unhappy with the result.

I would caution any attorney to work with this family.

reviews.text: Very disappointed with his help re beneficiaries in an adversarial estate case defined as follows:  Executor is a proven liar and uncommunicative to beneficiaries.  Executor's attorney is unresponsive and inept. Major headaches unresolved due to Brett's mismanagement and bad advice. He owes us $$ from the retainer and also his work product.  He apparently can't afford the $20 to send it to us or he's just being spiteful. Acted like a petulant child when a related house closing was awarded to another attorney. Felt like all our money was being spent to help him LEARN estate law, then he failed to advocate and press for answers from the opposing side. He gave us false hope on a very basic legal issue re joint tenancy; he should have known better.  Truly an ongoing nightmare and cannot in good conscience recommend him for this area of the law.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Unfortunately, there is no indication as to who wrote this review, so we have no way of knowing what, if anything, we discussed.

We speak with many potential clients everyday regarding many legal issues, and our goal is always to provide an honest assessment of each person's unique situation. While some may be disappointed or do not like what they hear, we believe it is important to provide accurate information and realistic recommendations.

We strive to provide excellent service and want our clients to feel confident and satisfied with the advice we provide

reviews.text: Very professional

My interaction with Maii and Attorney Brett Kaufman was outstanding. Professionally, Maii followed up with my request for a demand letter from my home warranty provider. I had first assumed that the contractor who had botched the furnace installation should receive the letter, but after reviewing all the details of my case, they forwarded the demand letter to the home warranty. Maii performed her homework and was able to send it to the company even though I didn't have an email address with me or anything online. The fact that they answered each email I sent them also amazed me.

Brett and his team provided great service and attention to detail in handling our case And took action with urgency.  Maii Rashad, Legal assistant was very attentive and personable. I would highly recommend Kaufman Legal Group to anyone who needs representation.

If you are in need of legal representation, I highly recommend Brett Kaufman. He is a talented attorney with a wealth of knowledge and experience, and he genuinely and deeply cares about his clients.

Attorney Kaufman handled a stressful situation with professionalism and tenacity. He was easily accessible via telephone and Emails. Needed advice on a legal advice. Joel was very helpful and spent a lot of time with me explaining my circumstances.

I have had the pleasure of working with Ms. Serrano with my contentious divorce. She and her team of knowledgeable individuals worked tirelessly to put my mind at ease and provided me with the best possible outcome. She is very personable and professional.  She took extreme care in my case as if I were her own family member. I trusted her with everything I had, and this woman did NOT disappoint! She is reasonable with her prices. You will get more than what you pay for with this Lady. I am very pleased with my outcome and would highly recommend her to anyone needing a Family Lawyer. She is truly Top Tier. She will take care of you!

Finding Serrano was truly a blessing, She quickly resolved my divorce.  I unfortunately used another Law Firm who drug it out for 3 years without any kind of resolution  just alot of time and money . I was referred to her from a friend and it was refreshing to see how quickly & attentively they handled my case .They are wonderful communicators kept me informed at all times and got back to me in a timely manner when I had questions. I cannot say enough how much I appreciate her and her staff . She will be my go to referral if anyone I know needs help in the future, Truly cannot thank them enough!

The best lawyer for a divorce case. I could not belive how organized and prepared she was. I felt that she really understood what i was going thru, and she helped me get out of the nightmare I was in. Thank you for winning my case! I highly recommend her!

This team was amazing! My mom had a lawyer prior to them that did absolutely nothing the whole first 10 months of my moms case. i found Serrano Legal Solutions and they were great to us from the start so i immediately fired the first lawyer.
My moms english is not the best but Samantha was great with translation and helping my mom understand when i wasnt present to help her. Now my moms divorced and living her best life thanks to this team!

The team of ladies here are so amazing at what they do! Having worked with them on a recent parentage case, I can say with confidence that I made the right choice in going with this firm. An affordable and capable alternative in a sea of overpriced options.

Like any other reputable firm, they do experience periods of higher volume, but they always make sure to return emails, calls, and texts promptly. They work tirelessly to make sure your situation is handled with respect and care. A collaborative group that values your input and feedback, treating you like a person rather than another transaction. Family cases are almost always stressful, let Lisette and her team help to lighten your load. (Thank you to Lisette, Sam, and Odalis for allllll of your help!!)

Had an amazing experience with Serrano’s legal team. Especially Samantha and Odalis. They were very resourceful and made the process easy. Thank you for your dedication and hard work. All my questions were answered in a timely manner no hassles.

My father hired Attorney Lisette Serrano in August 2024 after reading many positive reviews describing her as a fighter. Unfortunately, our experience was very disappointing and not what we expected.
From the start, communication with this firm was extremely poor. My father only spoke to Ms. Serrano once — during the initial consultation — and never again after that. Every single communication after hiring her was through her paralegals, While the paralegals were always very respectful and professional, and honestly communicated more with us than the attorney ever did, my father was paying for legal representation and should have received updates directly from his attorney.
Two scheduled phone conferences were also missed by Ms. Serrano. There was no follow-up, no apology, and no reassurance. Even after I voiced our concerns to her staff that we were unhappy and unsure about continuing, nothing changed. It felt as though no effort was made to guarantee client satisfaction, despite us expressing our frustration.
Despite paying in full and never missing a payment, my father was left completely in the dark about his own case. Court dates would come and go without any explanation of what happened or what the next steps were. I personally sent multiple emails asking for updates, The only response we received from Ms. Serrano herself was a brief “please be patient” email, after months of silence.
After more than 13 months of no progress, my father ultimately had to let her go. Over $4,000 was spent, and unfortunately, there was nothing to show for it.
The final phone call before ending services was especially upsetting. Ms. Serrano called under the mistaken impression that there was a phone conference scheduled (which there was not). During that call, she was dismissive, talked over me, would not let me express our concerns, and even said, “Keep talking — you’re only getting charged for this call.”

What was even more disappointing was her reaction when she learned that my father was in Mexico caring for his ill mother — something the entire law firm already knew. She seemed upset and said, “What is your father doing in Mexico during his divorce? He’s only sticking his head more in the sand.” That comment came across as rude, insensitive, and not something any client wants to hear from their own attorney. It was not reassuring in any way. She also mentioned that my father could be at risk of paying the other party’s attorney fees, which was confusing since we were never given updates or explanations throughout the entire 14 months of representation.

We are not writing this review to bad-mouth anyone, but to share an honest experience so that others who are searching for a truly dedicated divorce attorney can make a more informed decision. We genuinely wish things had been different.

Thank you
They are rude and very unprofessional. They blame you for their staff mistakes and just want a take your money.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. While I cannot discuss specific details about your case due to confidentiality, I want to address your concerns. My decision to withdraw was not made lightly and was based on professional considerations.

I am committed to maintaining a respectful and collaborative relationship with all my clients, as this is essential for effective legal representation. Unfortunately, circumstances in our case made it difficult to continue the attorney-client relationship in a manner consistent with my professional obligations.

I wish you the best in resolving your legal matters and remain dedicated to providing exceptional legal services to my clients.

reviews.text: She was hired by a family member of mine. Admitted that the case for this person was unlike any other case shes taken on before, all she did was take THOUSANDS of dollars to literally lead the case no where. reviews.ownerResponse: I genuinely appreciate your feedback and respect that your "family member" does not want to provide their name. However, my firm does not make false promises of any sort. I always advise my client's prior to retaining my services that there are only two ways to conclude a case, either by agreement or going to trial. All my cases have different circumstances. I have found with my 10 years of experience as an attorney that there are a few people who get frustrated with the legal system even after I spend time explaining each and every detail to them. reviews.text: Attorney Lisette Serrano has been such a pleasure to work with. She stepped in at a crucial point and has been instrumental in a successful outcome for me and my family! I am more than pleased with the results of choosing Serrano Legal solutions. I can tell they care about me and my family. Relationship is such a value in times of legal tensions. I am so grateful!

Absolutely horrid and would NOT recommend this attorney. PARENTS BEWARE!!! She does NOT favor you or your childrens welfare. She favors HER WALLET. I’m not sure where all of the positive reviews are coming from but truthfully speaking; she talks down to her clients, demeans and disrespects them. She has absolutely no compassion in her heart left at all. Family court is hell on Earth and cases are often extremely turbulent. They demand agility and emotional support. She fails in these categories completely. Please spare yourself the hurt and find an attorney who won’t talk down to you like a dog and over-charge you just to reach out. She does NOT keep up with communication and berates you when you inquire for any information on your case.

Actually, she took on a very turbulent case of mine on for just a very brief while (the short duration due to her own accord) and after racking up 5k in long-winded phone calls where my entire being and character were assaulted, she had the audacity to FILE TO WITHDRAW and leave me without any representation.

I would truthfully say in my heart this woman has reached that point in her career where she is a CON ARTIST. She is a VILLAIN and I say that on the children’s behalf.

Lisette, you have truthfully failed in being the “compassionate person in it for the children” you claim to be. I’ve found that that was a sales pitch and nothing more.

Anyone reading this, stay FAR FAR FAR AWAY from hiring this attorney. She will milk you for your money and then leave you without representation in the middle of your case if you don’t sit pretty and endure her verbal abuse.

Absolutely repulsed.

Shame on this woman to the fullest extent.

Edit to add in response to her response:
Everything I wrote here is TRUE and of my own experience. I literally would beg of her to talk nice to me on the phone. I was NOT the one with the nasty tone. She quite literally put me into tears infact with how nasty she was. I begged her to please talk nice and her own words were “this is how I talk.” She did not put 100% of anything into my case except for a fowl nasty attitude. Do NOT fall for her lies… just trying to save her poor behavior!

Please anyone reading this know what I have written is true and she is now threatening to sue me over defamation of character for an honest Google review… wow… guess she’s not one to take constructive criticism well!

RUN!!!!!

I rarely write online reviews for a number of reasons, but I feel compelled to share my experience.  With the current state of the economy, more and more people might find themselves in financial hardtimes.  This being said, there is hope for you if you use the legal system to resolve your issues.  There is a negative stigma surrounding the bankruptcy process, but most don’t understand that its your constitutional right not to end up in “debtors prison”.  This is why the bankruptcy code exists, to prevent a type of indentured servitude to creditors for the rest of your life.  If you find yourself feeling trapped with no options out, then pursing this path could be your quickest way to a fresh start.

Anyone that is reading this is more than likely backed into a financial corner in some capacity.  My situation was very complicated and involved a multi-million dollar business that I had signed personal guarantees on a large business loan.  As an entrepreneur, you never think that your business can fail, but sometimes outside circumstances put you in a position that is inescapable.  In early 2019, I found myself in this situation, and honestly didn’t have a way forward without numerous lawsuits and hefty debt repayments for my business debt.  After looking at nearly all options, I was referred to Mr. Lloyd who was very straight forward, and recommended that I file both a business and personal Chapter 7.

After mulling over the options, I was left with little choice but to file, and I can say that the process can be brutal at times, but everything that Mr. Lloyd told me eventually came to fruition.  Its truly a deeply emotional thing when you have to close a business that you’ve had for over a decade, but the advice that Mr. Lloyd gave me was exactly what was needed for me to gain a fresh start and a new footing debt free.

Working closely with Mr. Lloyd, and Tammy (who is like the glue that holds the office together), I received a discharge of my personal debt, was able to keep all of my belongings (including my house), and wipe the slate clean of all lingering business liabilities.

The only unfortunate aspect was that I had a client (that came from a family of attorneys) that decided to pursue an adversary proceeding against my personal Chapter 7.  Being that they were attorneys, it was obvious that the cost of going to trial wasn't an issue since they wouldn’t have to pay legal fees.  Upon learning that the adversary proceeding was moving forward, I again retained Mr. Lloyd to represent me for the trial.  After an exhaustive process with the opposing party (which bordered on being frivolous on their end) we prevailed on all counts with respect to the adversary proceeding.  When Mr. Lloyd called to tell me that we prevailed, I was almost in disbelief, and couldn’t be more thankful that I worked with David through the whole process.

Make no mistake, I think that going bankrupt should be a once in a lifetime last resort, but if you need to go this route, then Mr. Lloyd is the Attorney that can get you through the process as smoothly as possible.

For me, this was almost a two year process, but I now have zero debt, and can move forward with the rest of my life free of the burden of the business debt.  I highly recommend Mr. Lloyd, and just know that you aren't trapped, and if you have a relatively simple case, this is usually a straightforward process.

There is light at the end of the tunnel!

reviews.text:
Michael Donis was the attorney used for a property I purchased in mid-November 2025, and this was one of the worst professional experiences I’ve had. While the realtor bears significant responsibility, Mr. Donis’s handling of critical matters fell far below an acceptable standard.

The closing proceeded without providing keys to the property, which both Mr. Donis and the realtor treated as normal. No written arrangement was made, leaving me without access for weeks. As a first-time homeowner, I relied on their guidance. After closing, I received the Illinois Residential Real Property Disclosure Report—meant to be provided before contract execution—revealing potential plumbing issues involving tree roots. I could not investigate these issues promptly because I still had no keys, resulting in an $800 inspection once limited access was obtained. I was told the seller would reimburse this cost, which has not happened.

During a cold spell, a tenant’s furnace failed, and I again lacked access to the utility room. On Mr. Donis’s advice, I hired a locksmith at a cost of about $500, with assurances of reimbursement that never came. I later learned that a tenant was also delinquent on rent despite being told at closing that all tenants were current.

Mr. Donis stated he would send a 5-day notice and file an eviction, but he failed to do so. After weeks of no responses to emails, calls, or voicemails, I contacted eviction attorneys who confirmed no eviction had been filed and that the notice Mr. Donis claimed to send was invalid. They resolved the matter in under a week.

Overall, Mr. Donis’s lack of follow-through, poor communication, and failure to protect my interests caused unnecessary expense and stress. I strongly advise others to avoid this level of unprofessional representation.

Michael represented me in a civil matter and exceeded my expectations. He was honest, knowledgeable, and always willing to explain my options clearly. My case was resolved efficiently and without unnecessary delays. I truly appreciate his dedication and would not hesitate to recommend him to others seeking a trustworthy lawyer.

I had an excellent experience working with Michael and his team. From start to finish, he was incredibly professional, honest, and thorough. While the process took longer than I initially expected, Michael made sure I achieved everything I needed. He was aggressive when necessary, never sugar-coated anything, and always kept my best interests front and center.

Michael ensured that I received the child support I needed and carefully handled my parenting schedule to protect my time with my children. He also took decisive action to put an end to my ex’s harassment, which gave me much needed peace of mind. Thanks to his guidance and dedication, I was able to secure a fresh start, including a new apartment, and I’m slowly but steadily getting back on my feet.

I truly felt supported every step of the way, and I am so grateful for the professionalism, expertise, and care Michael and his team provided. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a skilled, honest, and determined attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the thoughtful review. We’re really glad Michael and the team could protect your time with your children, secure the support you needed, and help bring you some peace of mind. Wishing you continued strength and a smooth fresh start.

reviews.text:
I would never recommend this office to anyone. After this review is posted, the attorneys are most likely going to comment and act as if nothing happened and will possibly point the blame to us. We are not the problem. These attorneys are not honest or reliable. You are better off elsewhere.

In 2023, my father started the bankruptcy process with this office. After months with no updates, I became involved with communicating with this office via email. After emailing with their legal assistant, Sandy, she informed me that the process takes a few months and to keep sending the office check stubs and bank statements. That became a repeated process for months. While visiting my father at his home, he called the office to ask for an update and spoke with Sandy over the phone. He asked why this process has taken so long and why he hasn't received updates and asked to speak to the attorneys (John and/or Michael). Sandy stated she will inform the attorneys and they will call him back the following week. My father did not receive a call back, so I reached out to Sandy. She informed me that during her phone call with my father, he became unpleasant and started an argument with her. I informed her that I was present during that phone call and that is not how the conversation went. After being caught in a lie, she stated she'll have an attorney reach out.

After weeks of no updates, I emailed the office stating if they do not wish to assist my father with his case, we would like to go elsewhere. Attorney, John Ferrentino, responded to my email stating:

"There is no elsewhere to go. We have done the work. And are ready to do more. All he needs to do Is call us like we said several times last time you emailed.
He can call now
And he. The client. Can say a time with us. His lawyers. To do what he needs done
Like we have done for years for him.".

In February 2025, progress was finally being made and my father completed the pre-assesment and received a certificate. Sandy informed us that the next step is to wait for a letter in the mail that'll provide a case number and location/time for our 3/26/2025 court date. My father and I both requested off work to attend this court date. A week before 3/26, we informed the office that we had not received the mailed notice and a receptionist informed us that their may be a delay due to federal workers. I, again, reached out to Sandy for an update and she was unresponsive.

In May 2025, still no court date was set. I sought out answers from another attorneys office and they informed me that my father's bankruptcy was never filed and that the trustees have not held court cases in person for the past three years; therefore, we should not have had to wait for a time/location for the 3/26/25 court date.

No matter how many phone calls or office visits, nothing was ever done.

After being served papers from the credit card companies threatening to garnish wages, Sandy was always our first point of contact and her assistance was never helpful. It was always the same, "check stubs and bank statements".

I requested a refund and was issued one via check. Though I am happy my father was able to receive a refund, I am upset and disappointed in the service provided by this office. Lie after lie. My father waited years for his bankruptcy to be settled, only to find out he was given the runaround and nothing was ever processed. My father received multiple notices from credit card companies threatening to garnish wages and this law office did absolutely nothing to expedite this process. What a shame. This office cannot meet the needs of their clients and I would never recommend their services.

As of today, his bankruptcy has been filed and has already met with the trustee and settled his debts. This process with the new office took less than 3 months while Ferrentino's office made us wait 3 years for an answer we were never going to receive.

I went in for help with my case in January 2025. We agreed on moving forward and everything seemed like it was moving at the beginning. After no phone calls returned and emails unanswered I decided to ask for a refund. I immediately received a response stating that I was given a special price and that there was no refund but I was able to have the paperwork that was submitted. In May I had to go to the court house and found out that nothing has been filed. Since then I have been calling and emailing consistently but absolutely no response. I also went into the office and of course the attorney was not there and a message was taken like always and no response. I was robbed and I am super mad. I don't know what else to do.

I received your response and I want you to proof to me where this communication was taken place. Call me asap.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. DeLeon-

Respectfully, you are completely incorrect about your statement. From the outset, the complexity of your case was explained to you. More importantly, you were told it would take time. It has. This should not be a surprise.

The very reasonable rate you were provided was due to the fact that the success of your petition was not likely, but only the Court would be able to either grant or deny your petition. As such, in an effort to try to assist you we provided you with an extremely low rate ($500) as a courtesy to you to do our best to help you.

The petition which you asked was filed and the majority of the fee paid to our firm was used for payment to the Cook County Clerk (nearly $200). In short, our firm has essentially worked for free as a courtesy for you yet you continue to want to utilize attorney time while we are simply waiting for a ruling from the court. This has been explained to you on numerous occasions.

These are the facts, and we have never taken money from anyone without delivery of services. Unfortunately, it seems you have unreasonable and unrealistic expectations

Took the time to answer every single question I had. Any time I called his office his team was fantastic and walked me through whatever I needed to send in, step by step.
