I was diagnosed at 48 years old with an incurable progressive brain disease which had forced to seek social security disability benefits. I applied on SSI web page for SSDI in July of 2023 and a few months later under the recommendation referral by a friend I decided to seek out the help of an attorney with my SSI claim as I had been told multiple times that if you are under 50 at first try most applications are denied and will require legal counsel to fight via appeal on your behalf. First impressions of speaking on the phone and first meeting with Mr. Barone - he was extremely professional,   kind/emphatic and driven to help me with my case he kept our time together well organized and thoughtful agenda. He was very patient and made me feel heard, cared while laying out a plan of action for the road ahead to help me with a speedy decision on claim. Throughout the claim he was always available via call, text or email 7 days a week it seemed like he was always there to make me and my wife comfortable and looked after with any questions or concerns we had. Amazing bedtime manners and professionalism as a commercial real estate lender by career of 29 years I had contact and experience with various types of attorneys but I don't remember any one else like Mr. Barrone - voice tonality, strength and direction of thought, sharp and quick mind with amazing communication skills. Hiring Mr. Barrone made me fee l lucky to be his client from day 1. He set the table with expectations on the entire process from day and laid out a clear action plan and map for me to follow with recommendations for various doctor evaluation  tests  geared to help the SSI review process and expedite my decision. Exactly one year from the time of filling my case I was given an approval decision by the medial review team of the SSI administration without even a formal in person hearing or interview. I attribute the speed of my claim approval 100% to attention to details and had work of Mr. Barrone. If you find your self in my position you will never regret hiring  Mr. Barrone to assist you with your disability claim. best decision you will make for your family.
Sincerely and greatful, George Hristov

reviews.text:
asked him about something i had been thinking about for months. i went in because i had noticed the past couple times i visited social security the sign in the hallway showing services. because of the availability & my lack of knowledge of where lawyers are (even though i ask around, ask social workers etc) Andrew A. Barone basically helped me out a lot via a free consultation. in just 15 minutes he helped me save time on doing further paperwork. i am grateful. thank you so much!!!

notes on availability:
- he's on the first floor of the building so that helps out. i don't use a wheelchair, but i think you might be able to use one.
- social security also opens up at 9AM (& it's on the 6th floor. there are elevators) so i guess if you wanted to go to social security in the same day, you should probably figure that into your schedule. it might be only a few minutes for a consultation, but the line/queue at the social security office might be a concern (in a similar way to public transit).
- i don't know his pricing or at what point it stops being a consultation, so you'll have to ask him.
- i kind of wanted to say this office has a convenient location, but because i'm disabled (& hello "concentration in disability") i think "available" & "accessible" are better fitting for this situation.

this place is awesome & i hope this office stays around for a long time!
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you so very very much for your wonderful review. We hope that we live up to that description with every interaction that we have.

All the best.

Andrew

reviews.text:
Back in early 2020 I started to search for a family law attorney to handle my divorce case that had recently been filed. I selected 5 attorneys that I wanted to interview and started the process to interview each of them. After speaking with all five I finally decided on Naveed Husain and his firm Farooqi & Husain. I made this choice for a few key reasons. First and foremost Naveed is a God fearing man. That told me that he would always be  honest with me. Secondly he was very direct and blunt with his communication with me. This directness and honesty is something I always look for in a lawyer and third Naveed understood my needs almost immediately. In our early meetings he very accurately predicted the outcome well before it materialized.

Once I selected him and his firm I got a chance to meet his staff. They were nothing short of the best legal support staff I have ever worked with.

From the very beginning Naveed and at times his partner Ausaf were incredibly strategic in how they planned my case. They had tremendous insight into how family law works and in practice how divorce proceedings would unfold as the case progressed. Naveed’s legal acumen never failed me once. Literally everything he said that would happened happened. In almost two years there was never a single instance where I was surprised. He told me where is was strong and where my case was weak. He was direct and honest as I expected and never once lead me to believe that I could and would gain any legal advantage that wasn’t realistic. Naveed understood the issues as a matter of law and navigated some very touchy issues with deadly accuracy and finesse. Where we needed to argue a matter before the judge Naveed prevailed every single time. In all my 24 years of being in business for myself and having dealt with over a dozen different lawyers with a variety of legal specializations Naveed and his legal mind impressed me the most.  He knew exactly what he was doing and nailed it 100% of the time. Never once did I ever feel like we could have done better. Not once.

Financially, working with Farooqi & Husain was an absolute blessing. Most lawyers bill in 15 to 30 minute increments. Which means that if you call them for 5 minutes they will charge you for 15 minutes or if you call them for 16 minutes they will charge you for 30 minutes. With Naveed his firm bills in 6 minute increments. Which to me as a client means that he is very fair when it comes to billing. No money wasted at all in unfair billing practices. His rates as a world class lawyer are incredibly fair. Even though, with his experience and acumen the could be billing at an exorbitant rate like most downtown Chicago attorneys would, Naveed maintained a just and very fair bill rate for himself and his staff. In the end I felt like I was working with a large downtown law firm with marble conference tables and a 55th floor view of the lake for prices that were more than reasonable. Never once, in the whole two years did I ever question a single invoice I received from his firm.

In the end, after an almost 2 year protracted battle that at times got ugly I got exactly what Naveed predicted I would get almost two years before when I met him in his office in Oakbrook Terrace.

Finally now, Alhamdolillah, my divorce is done. My ex got what she legally deserved and got what was legally fair to both her and the children and I got what I expected and was predicted. Naveed navigated some very tricky situations professionally and effectively.

All in all working with Naveed and his staff and firm was a fantastic experience and I will recommend him as much as I possibly can for anyone seeking assistance with any family law matter especially divorce cases.

Thank you Naveed for everything you did for me and thank you for your honesty, integrity and fairness. May Allah bless you InshAllah. Jazak Allah

reviews.text:
How is it possible that there's no way to contact anyone at that office?
I paid them $10,000 in less than a year to follow up on an immigration case. And the form is still pending. My recommendation is to find someone who is actually interested in your case and not just in the money, because they're quick to collect payment month after month, but when it comes to prioritizing the client's petitions, they drag their feet. I recently sent an email and called so they can't say I'm the one not answering, but the bad review is still here. I hope that people who are dealing with this woman can resolve their cases because in my case, it didn't work out. I'm still waiting after three years to see when they'll finally respond. At least they should feel a little shame.

Terrible service in every way. My mom paid them over $10,000 and in the end they didn't resolve anything at all, and on top of that, they kept charging her $100 a month until they finally abandoned her case 🤬

Do not waste your time or money on Immigration Law at this firm. They will take your money and not give an ounce of effort to work your case. Have you pay more than once for the same services, not update your case to purposely extend it - generating more revenue for them. You won’t be given the decent courtesy of communication from the paralegal much less the attorney directly. Taking advantage of people wanting to do things the right way. This place should be investigated.

I do not recommend them. I spent many years with them on an immigration case, and they never gave me an answer because the person supposedly handling my case was never available. Every time I tried to contact them, they were on vacation or at meetings. In 10 years, I never met the person who was supposedly handling my case. It was a very bad experience, and I'm still waiting for them to call me back.
Samantha was very kind and friendly during the call.

I had a disappointing experience working with Attorney Diaz. At her request, I spent time securing terms for her professional liability insurance. Unfortunately, she was often unresponsive, which made it difficult to move forward. She scheduled a conference call with me but did not attend, provide notice or reschedule. Due to the time I spent on numerous calls with Gina, negotiating terms with numerous companies, sending proposals, I issued an invoice, very reasonable amount considering the number of hours I worked, which remains unpaid. I believe that professionals should respect each other's time and commitments, and in this case, that standard was not met.
🤣 this company is a true joke. My landlord used this company to try and extort and harass me. Now I’m in the process of suing my landlord because of them!!
We had a terrible experience, awful service at the office of Attorney Gina Diaz, with a property closure.

I wouldn't give them zero stars. Terrible service. We paid over $5,000 for work permits and they never gave them to us. They just wanted us to pay more money. Don't go and lose your money; they know nothing about immigration. I had to pay elsewhere where they only charged me $200 per work permit, and the whole process only took a month. The lawyers and Gina Diaz submitted my immigration application late after I had already paid them $3,000 upfront. It's a complete scam. I have proof of emails and everything I paid. They advertise everywhere—on the radio, in newspapers—but their whole process is a lie. Don't be fooled. 🙏 At first, they're very friendly, but after they get the money, they just give empty promises. We never met the "lawyer" Gina Diaz or the person who represented us.

Working with Diaz Case Law was truly a blessing. I had been trying to resolve a situation on my own for four months, and it felt like I was getting nowhere. On top of that, I had bad luck with real estate attorneys in the past, which made me hesitant to trust the process again. But then Mrs. Diaz stepped in – and she knocked it out in a single day. I was honestly blown away by how quickly and efficiently she handled everything.

I can confidently say I wouldn’t have been able to accomplish my real estate goals as seamlessly without her and her incredible team. Their knowledge, professionalism, and ability to get things done exceeded all my expectations.

Mrs. Diaz didn’t just treat me like a client – she treated me like family, making sure I felt supported and informed throughout the process. Her dedication and care turned what felt like an overwhelming roadblock into a smooth and successful outcome.

I am overly grateful for everything Diaz Case Law has done for me, and I can’t recommend them highly enough. If you need someone who will go the extra mile and deliver results, look no further.

Thank you so much to Karen and staff for their patience and support through my real esate closing. They know all the ins and outs of different types of transactions. I can always trust them with helping me get these deals done.

Attorney Diaz must be very good at real estate when you see these reviews! But she's doing so well she forgot she was a lawyer! And now she has 0 customer service at the law office! Paulina was my lawyer and she left and no one called me to tell me that my case was no longer with her! And the worst thing is that Mr. Carlos Diaz's son was in charge of my case and never told me until I spoke to ask about my case with Paulina and they told me that another lawyer was in charge of my case! I spoke to Mr. Diaz and the truth is that Miss Paulina was better! I've been with them since 2017! And they haven't even called me to tell me how my case is going! I renewed my DACA with them! They received my permit at the office and NO ONE called me to tell me that my permit had arrived and they had it for 1 month! I realized because I went to check my case and it said that my permit had been delivered to the office! When I spoke, the secretary told me that nothing had arrived! Until I told him that the website said they had it for a month! Then he says: “Let me check the mail that arrived today!” And he comes back and says: “The postman just delivered it, I already have it, you can come pick it up!” WHY DOES ONE PAY THEM IF ONE IS THE ONE WORKING! And now I checked my case again and he tells me that it was denied a year ago! And I didn’t even realize why my lawyer doesn’t check his cases! Now that’s why I’m here airing his dirty laundry! Take your money to someone who WILL work on your case!!!! Don’t let them take advantage of you! Like they did to me!
Gina Diaz and her staff are fantastic!  They handle all my transactions with care and close on time!!

Thank you Diaz Case for amazing closings! Gina & her whole team is great to work with and have helped me saved a lot of $$$$ over the years. “The Right Attorney” works with hundreds of investors like myself to acquire investment properties. Her latest book “Gratitude” is a great read.

Horrible service, have been with this firm on the same case for years and never once actually sat down with lawyer Diaz. They just pass your case around to other people and give you the run around on everything.  You literally have to chase them down and harass them to get any update or information. Then they claim immigration lost your money order and you have to send a new one. We're paid up on our contract and they have yet to complete their side of the contract. They refuse to provide a copy of our file until "the case is all wrapped up and done" even though it's your legal right to receive a copy of it regardless of whether or not its completed. The ones who handle your case give you the run around and lie straight to your face, and never check their emails or update the file let alone update you. Think that since they got their money they don't have to make the effort to help anymore. The people handling your case are unprofessional and rude claiming that you the client never sent anything requested when you had with the emails to prove it. Find somewhere else to get your legal work done unless you enjoy being belittled, disrespected, and throwing your money away.
They were very patient with a slow loan officer.

It's really throwing your money away. Look for asylum help and a deportation order. The asylum application was never submitted, and the only thing I managed to do was get the deportation order removed. For that, I had to pay another lawyer $500 to represent me because this was in Memphis, and she was very good, by the way. And do you know how much this cost me?! $21,000, money I'm still paying because they make you sign a contract, and to comply with that contract, I'm still giving away my money. I only have $4,000 left. I'm letting you know because those of you who still have time can prevent this. Oh, and another thing I want to clarify: I never met the lawyer Gina Diaz, and when I asked to speak with her, they gave me times that they knew I couldn't make because of my job. I also asked them to send me proof of what they had done in my case, and I never received anything. I only have the document the judge gave me from the court I had because the other lawyer who represented me provided it. It was a bad experience, but you learn from your mistakes. I leave everything to God. 🙏 He knows best...

reviews.text: This is just a review of what Attorney Katherine and her office did for me.  The mental nightmare started when I received a speeding ticket and was totally nervous as was mentioned to me and also through my google search that this can be considered a misdemeanor.  I have never had a misdemeanor on my record so needless to say this scared the "Jesus" out of me.  The next day I did a google search and came across Attorney Katherine's firm and thank God I did!  I called their office and Paralegal Brittany was very calm but yet assuring that their office would take care of this. Of course you badly want to believe this but the mental game starts.  Along the way I would email the office and time again Brittany reassured the "old wreck" over here that their office has this covered and that they would take care of me.  Fast forward to the court date....standing nervously outside the courtroom I finally see Kathryn and again she reassured me that she has this covered and that she was going to speak to the prosecuting attorney before I go in, mind you with a very confident demeanor and voice.  Waited for about ten minutes and she came out with a smile.  Without going into specifics she negotiated a MUCH lighter sentence.  I would highly recomend to ANYONE who has been cited a speeding ticket to contact Attorney Katherine's office.  Starting with the receptionist's very calm voice next to Brittany the paralegal who is very  knowledgeable but yet calming way of letting you know that their office has plenty of experience in cases like this!  Finally,  to Attorney Katherine she was a miracle worker in the courtroom!  She has this very down to earth character and yet a strong person who knows her craft!  Thank you to all of you for this victory that I will never forget!  The BEST investment ever made!  E.M.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, E.  We were thrilled to help you achieve such great results and relieve you of anxiety in the process!

reviews.text: Kathryn Harry was fantastic, and her office staff, especially Patricia, have been very prompt, reassuring and helpful. Kathryn helped us strike a good deal, quashing three out of four tickets. Highly recommended.

Great people. Answered phone and explained all the options i have. I am definitely recommending them. If need help regarding traffic ticket i will definitely hire this law firm. Thanks for being so explanatory.

First, thank you Patty for being very exceptional at returning my calls and working with me. Second, Thank you Alex for your hard work at reducing what could have been a LARGE fine and potentially something worse. If you are searching for a great attorney please contact this office, they are more than professional and I would recommend talking to Patty and working with Alex to any one.

Alexandra was very helpful.  She did everything she could to advocate for me and was able to reduce excessive fines to an amount I was satisfied with.  She was very responsive and clearly explained everything to me from the time I got my ticket until we left the court hearing.  They explained all of my options and stayed in touch throughout the entire process.

Rudest people ever. I called them and the paralegal in the office did not let me even finish my sentences, kept interrupting me and before even knowing the complete situation, kept saying we cannot do it. The first and the foremost thing a divirce attorney or office is suppose to provide the caller is comfort and that was the last thing on her head. Very Very Rude
reviews.ownerResponse: Unfortunately, your case was not in the State of Illinois.  We are not licensed to practice in the State in which your matter was or could have been filed.   We apologize for any distress we may have caused you by not being able to answer your questions.  However, please keep in mind, that laws differ from state to state and our lawyers are familiar with Illinois law which would not have helped you.

reviews.text:

reviews.ownerResponse: We regret that we were unable to assist you with your traffic ticket.  We do not routinely turn away business. However, there are court locations in Illinois at which our attorneys do not work due to a variety of factors making it infeasible to do so, including their proximity to our offices, the types of cases handled in particular locations  (i.e.: administrative), and the like.  In other situations, our attorneys are already committed to representing others who have retained our services prior to receiving a request for representation from a potential client. As for our fees, they do vary based upon the complexity of the case and the services that the client wants or needs. When a potential client contacts our office, one of our attorneys, not a staff member, evaluates the nuances of the potential client's case. At that time, a fee for our services is set. If the potential client does not find the fee acceptable, for whatever reason, often times the attorney will suggest other alternatives available. At other times, the services of an attorney may not be needed  to achieve a favorable outcome so he/she may be told that he/she could handle the matter on his/her own. We hope that this more fully explains why we were unable to assist you with your particular case. We wish you success in defending your speeding ticket.

I want to extend my deepest gratitude to Shawn Bolger and her incredible team for the exceptional work they did in helping me through the complex process of inheriting a home and setting up a mortgage. From day one, Shawn was friendly, approachable, and incredibly knowledgeable. She consistently followed up with me in a timely manner, answered all of my questions with patience and clarity, and ensured I was comfortable at every step.

Shawn and her team managed everything from beginning to end—including coordination with a land trust company, the bank, and my mortgage banker. She prepared an equity buyout letter for me, gave solid advice and practical recommendations, and even helped me save money through a referral to a more affordable title company.

What truly stood out was her commitment to making the entire experience seamless. Even when we ran into multiple challenges with the bank, Shawn remained patient, understanding, and laser-focused on getting everything resolved efficiently and correctly. I genuinely could not have navigated this process without her support and expertise.

I wholeheartedly recommend Shawn Bolger and her team to anyone in need of a real estate attorney. Their professionalism, thoroughness, and dedication to their clients are second to none.

reviews.text: would definitely not recommend. adjectives that come to mind: disorganized, unprofessional, rude, moody, bullying. had a not noteworthy but satisfactory experience 10years ago w/ my condo purchase, however experience decidedly sour this time around, yikes. she/they act as though they're doing you a huge favor and talk down to you. ironic as their emails are a collection of random words (do not read like a professional missive most lawyers would compose) & you have no idea who you're talking to, is it an attorney, paralegal, legal aide, law student? no idea, no one deigns to formally introduce yourself, a different individual wiil randomly contact you q3weeks. in response to a 3rd request for emails clients can read/understand, she/they replied other option is sending fax (umm... prehistoric much?). the mention of using a fax machine as a satisfactory, "better" mode of communication, one that is superior to a well-composed email, was the final proverbial nail. overall it's a shame she/they aren't as tough and forceful and hard-hitting on who or what you need to be as they are with their own heretofore loyal clients- e.g., the bursts of anger towards clients and shouting ("your closing and appraisal could be delayed! at least if the lender and builder are working together, they can just work off the plan rather than needing a finished house to close. I mean, DO YOU WANT YOUR CLOSING TO BE DELAYED?" - why in the world would I not want the home to 1st be completed in its entirety prior to closing?  there is obvi potential for a conflict of interest between the preferred lender & builder- & fact she refused to hear me/understand was very troubling indeed) vs. a one to two sentence letter to a difficult preferred lender, which unsurprisingly helped not at all (how much will they charge for me that i wonder?). they clearly never read through the paperwork i sent months prior either ('when did they closing was? what's the purchase price again, huh?'). they will constant harp on irrelevant issues that only personally irk them, e.g., about my not contacting them "early enough"- to put it simply, who cares? the inability to simply get over it was childish. the (revised since years past) lottery home purchase process i had didn't allow for much flexibility/dawdling & i knew of numerous customers who went through the exact same experience I did, where they were simply never pre-approved after 60+ days (despite great finances, a conventional W2 job, excellent credit scores plus or minus a loan contingency clause returning ones earnest money if a loan is not secured) & it was a long/unserious process with high drama at time of closing w/ 'preferred' lender too. why in the world should ones lawyer ceaselessly pressure & bully you to sign on with such characters? like, get a grip and start listening to the client, it shouldn't all about you and your ego. as everyone knows too, not opting to move forward with a builder's preferred lender (as I did with my condo a decade ago) is not the end of the world; as with anything else, there are upsides and downsides, the latter including the potential for a builder-lender conflict of interest. these presumed lawyers however wouldn't quit nattering on abt going w/ that lender; i wouldn't be surprised if they were actually working in the best interests of said lender, whew! i received zero helpful advice (similar to other clients who reported the same, my questions landed on deaf ears, despite my having to be proactive and calling/emailing). i flatly refuse to beg folks i am paying fees to for help though. & i didn't want this firm's extremely dour and negative vibes to dog me for the rest of my homebuying journey and signed on with another group who is Competent and Caring, what a concept !!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Dr. Mathew,

We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback, and we’re genuinely sorry to hear that your recent experience did not meet your expectations. Our team is committed to providing diligent, respectful, and professional service to all our clients, and we regret that you felt otherwise during your transaction.

Real estate closings—especially new construction with non-preferred lenders—can be complex and time-sensitive, and our communications are meant to help clients meet critical deadlines and protect their interests. We always aim to be clear, accessible, and thorough, though we understand that the process can sometimes feel overwhelming or impersonal.

We take your concerns seriously and will use them as an opportunity to evaluate how we can better support and communicate with clients going forward. Should you wish to speak further or clarify any specific issues, we would welcome the opportunity to do so privately.

We sincerely wish you the very best with your new home and thank you again for your past and present business.

Sincerely,
Shawn M. Bolger
Shawn Bolger Law

I had the privilege of working with Attorney Sean Connolly numerous times, and I am beyond impressed with the exceptional legal services he provided. Sean's dedication, and unwavering commitment to my cases were truly remarkable, making a significant impact on the outcome of my situation.

From our initial consultation, Sean displayed a deep understanding of law and an impressive ability to analyze complex legal matters. His comprehensive knowledge and strategic approach gave me confidence that I was in capable hands. Sean took the time to listen attentively, patiently addressing all my concerns and ensuring that I understood the intricacies of my case.

Throughout the legal process, Sean's professionalism and responsiveness were exceptional. He promptly answered my questions, provided regular updates, and guided me through each step, offering sound advice and support. His attention to detail, thorough preparation, and effective communication skills were instrumental in building a strong defense on my behalf.

One of Sean's standout qualities is his genuine care for his clients. He treated me with compassion, empathy, and respect, understanding the immense stress and uncertainty that accompanies legal proceedings. Sean's reassuring demeanor and unwavering support helped alleviate my anxiety, instilling a sense of confidence and trust in his abilities.

During critical moments, Sean's courtroom presence was truly impressive. His sharp legal acumen, persuasive arguments, and ability to think on his feet were evident as he navigated the complexities of my case. His dedication to protecting my rights and pursuing the best possible outcome was unwavering.

I am immensely grateful for Sean's outstanding legal representation, which resulted in a favorable resolution for my case. His dedication to justice and relentless pursuit of the truth are a testament to his exceptional skills as an attorney.

I wholeheartedly recommend Sean Connolly to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, skilled, and compassionate attorney. His professionalism, and unwavering commitment to his clients make him an exceptional choice. Working with Sean was an absolute privilege, and I am grateful for his tireless efforts in securing a positive outcome.

Thank you, Sean, for your exceptional legal guidance and support. You are a true advocate for justice, and I would highly recommend you to anyone in need of outstanding criminal defense representation.

What meant the most to me was that she treated me with genuine kindness and respect, never making me feel like just another case. She balanced her sharp legal skills with humanity and empathy, and that made all the difference during one of the most difficult times of my life.

I am beyond grateful for everything she has done for me and my children. I wholeheartedly recommend Kristin to anyone in need of a family attorney who is not only an outstanding advocate but also a true source of support and compassion.

I highly recommend retaining legal services from the Law Office of Christopher Edmonds.

I initially retained Christopher Edmonds in 2011 for ongoing issues in my divorce. Chris and Maria were phenomenal, giving invaluable guidance and a “steady hand” during the entirety of some very complex and difficult matters.

During the middle of my case, Kristin took lead. She was very well versed on all the issues in my case. I was very happy with the resolution and results. She presented well in court and was always prepared looking out for my best interest and represented me well. She was very professional and compassionate, carrying on the tradition and high bar set by Christopher.

Just recently I had a critical and time sensitive filing that was necessary.  I didn’t hesitate for one second. I contacted Kristin and she was able to rectify the situation in a matter of days which was beyond helpful for my closure.

Kristen and her entire staff are un believable and easy to work with.
We spent a lot of time and money with another attorney and got no where.
Kristen jumped in and custody and divorce was done. Please please don't underestimate if you are a male using Kristen, she has a no nonsense approach.
We love working with her and her staff.
Thank you, Kristen and your whole staff you are one of the best!!

I would highly recommend  the lawyers at Christopher D. Edmonds.  They were professional and knowledgeable throughout my divorce preceding, which provided me peace of mind throughout the challenges that such contests bring out.  They also seem to have great respect from the court system.

I secured a favorable outcome due to this firm.  Highly recommend!
Highly Recommend. Professional.  Dedicated To Detail

Jenn made the entire process straightforward and uncomplicated. She was always timely with communications and made herself available to answer any of my questions. She is a pleasure to work with and she took on my very challenging situation and moved it into positive solutions for me and my children. She truly cares about her clients and is well respected within the courts. I would retain Jenn again without question. I highly recommend Jennifer and all of the staff at the Law Offices of Christopher D. Edmonds, Ltd.

Jen Howe and Kristin Flanagan are phenomenal family law attorneys. They are knowledgeable and have great integrity. They always do what they say and are very responsive to their clients' needs. I have referred several cases to their office over the years and consistently receive great feedback.
I am very please on how the law Firm and my Lawyer handled my case and was able to do it all in a timely fashion while keeping the costs down.

An incredible group of women! Kristin is amazing to work with. Maria too. Everyone that helped in my case in any way was kind, compassionate, helpful, and understanding. I could not recommend this firm any more. I'd give 5+ stars if I could. Kristin and team has the ability to make a difficult, emotional, stressful season of life a little bit easier.

The law offices of Edmonds law were very professional and always made me feel comfortable when I called. My attorney Jennifer Howe was the absolute best! Very professional and forward but always made me feel like I was always in good hands.
My experience with the lawfirm was excellent with working with Kristin, Jen and staff . I definitely recommend them.

Divorce is a horrible thing to go through and Kristin, Maria and the rest of their staff made this process much easier with their compassion, knowledge and professionalism.  They get 5 stars from me and I would refer them to anyone needing legal representation.

The time and effort I have received from both Kristin and Jen has been amazing. I have 2 ongoing court cases with both, and getting results after going through two other attorneys. They explain every step, guide you when in difficult situations, are compassionate, and are just downright good women to work with. Kristins dad originally represented me in one of the cases and I am so glad she followed in his  footsteps. Jen Howe has gotten in the trenches for me like no other lawyer. Kristin was an absolute joy to work with for my case! She made sure to explain everything step by step and prepare me for what to expect. All of my questions and concerns were always addressed. Jennifer Howe is extremely knowledgeable in family law and guided me through a life-changing event. She was transparent, professional, and prompt with all of her communication.

My only complaint is that I didn't hire Kristin and her team sooner!! I had hired two divorce attorneys previous to Kristin and my case was at a stand still. I was beginning to lose hope. Kristin was extremely patient and very friendly. She really worked to understand all the facts of my case and helped finally got things moving. Where my other attorneys could never be reached, Kristin and her team were always available and happy to answer my questions. Kristin and her team were very easy to work with and I can't recommend her office enough! This is the attorney you want fighting for you!!

I went through a difficult divorce, my ex husband made it very hard for me and I felt like I had no way out.  Kristin and her team were there for me and helped me tremendously. They were very professional and also kind. I felt like I had a friend in the courtroom with me.  I highly recommend them.

I would recommend highly this law firm in Westchester, ill

She made this process so simple and stress free for me.

Going through a custody battle for your child is very challenging. There are so many emotions involved and Kristen and her team from The Law Offices of Christopher D. Edmonds, Ltd. made this process as smooth as it could be. The first conversation we had with Kristen she was honest, hopeful and patient with all our questions. We later met in person and came up with a game plan together. We worked together for the best outcome for our situation and we definitely received that. Their whole team was very professional and understanding. Kristen was very detailed and advocated for us in all ways. Their whole law office did an outstanding job, and we are very pleased with our outcome. We highly reccomend them and can’t say enough great things about them.

I hope you never experience a divorce.  It is devastating to be the recipient of a petition for divorce from your spouse!   I received a petition for divorce from my then wife of MANY years of marriage.  I was in a panic and didn't know what to do next.  I spoke with several Divorce Attorneys who I could have secured services from, but when I spoke with Kristin Flanagan, I just felt much better and much calmer.

After securing the services of The Law Offices of Christopher D. Edmonds, Ltd. I asked a lot of questions, that in retrospect were probably unneeded, BUT Kristin and her team gave me answers to my questions.   I am sure I was a pest, but when you have never ventured down the road of divorce, you don't understand the processes.

From first securing services to going through the excruciating processes required in the "discovery stage" of divorce, it was a step-by-step process.  I was supported fully by Kristin and her team.  Kristin and her team are very concerned, compassionate and supportive of needs as you move through unknown territory, and I felt very calm knowing they had my back.

In having gone through the divorce and it has been finalized, "I WOULD IN A HEARTBEAT SECURE THE SERVICE OF KRISTIN AND HER TEAM"!!  If you want a team who really want the BEST for you, then this law office is your "BEST CHOICE"!

Chris
Kristin is a second generation family law attorney and it shows. Kristin and her team are very ethical and knowledgeable and will help you every step of the way.

Although she initially assured us she'd be with us 'every step of the way' - suffice it to say, I don't believe Vanessa was up for the challenge. My questions and concerns were only met with vague and misleading answers and insults. Save yourself many headaches, do not use this attorney. Also, please note that I wrote my honest opinion here and she threatened to sue me to take it down.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Attorneys licensed to practice law in the State of Illinois as well attorneys across the board seek to hold themselves to a higher standard of professionalism and ethics. As you are an attorney, you must certainly know this. We do not mis-speak or mis-represent. While your statements seek to damage the reputation of our firm, we are very proud of the work we completed for 25 individual unit owners. That is 25 individual closings, completed from contract to close within the following date range: September 16, 2018- December 20, 2018. We personally met with every unit owner to review closing documents and received numerous thank you's post closing along with flowers and gift cards for my staff. We have since represented almost 10 of those of unit owners in their next purchases.
While we certainly understand your statements, there is a vast difference between the academics of law and the actual practice of law. We wish you all the best as you move on to your new property in the future.

Additionally, he has the best value out of all the firms I contacted. Filing bankruptcy is a really stressful time, and I appreciated getting such personalized advice and support at a price I could afford, even while experiencing disability.
He gave me great information and advice I appreciate it thank you he is a good person to go to

Fantastic, I would highly recommend to give Sam a call if you are in financial trouble and are in need of bankruptcy advise. Sam is the best Attorney to go to regarding bankruptcy, I know him for over 15 years.

I was in serious financial trouble.There was only one way out,unless I won the lottery.I went to the most advertised on TV Bankruptcy law firm because they had an office 2 blocks from my residence.I own no property nor stocks/bonds therefore my case is what you'd call a very basic one.After 1 1/2 hours in the waiting room(no one else was in waiting room and only one other client was in with an attorney,an attorney finally came out to get me..he was a very nice man and we spent 40 minutes going over my situation.He quoted me a price of $2,000!! and the accomadation was "only have to give us $1200 to start and you can pay us $100 @ month till its paid off.I was taken back by that price but what do I know.Well,I learned a lot.My brother had used Chandraiah law firm a number of years ago and told me to call Sam.I met with Sam,found out there was a lot of stuff Peter's guy did not tell me.When Sam Chandraiah and I got done he told me what his fee was.It was $1,000 less than the famous TV guy!! I told him we had a deal.The next month was pretty much painless during this process.The pain was me having to find some necessary documents.Sam is honest,personable,and efficient.I recommend him and his firm without ANY hesitation.If ypu must go through this challenging ordeal do it with this guy.He will go out of his way to protect you and finalize the procedure and he talks to you,treats you, like a friend.  YOUTUBE-stephen sage a.s.c.a.p.

Review 1 of 2:

As I sit here reflecting on 2025 going into the new year I wanted to make sure you (people reading this lol) understand what Mondry and Mondry means to me…I was targeted and falsely accused. I can’t describe the disbelief, confusion, fear, anger, grief…when you’re faced with a life altering situation. Karen Mondry is fierce, compassionate, intelligent, tough, persistent and caring, about fighting for you. When this hypocrisy actually went to trial she objected so much (to get it on record) that the Judge (in his own words) said okay let’s give the prosecution a chance, lol.. in other words (the way I understood it;) was we all know this doesn’t make sense but give him a chance to save face a lil.. lol. Bottom line everyone, it was dismissed. I can’t express enough how amazing Mondry and Mondry are. When they say, “if you hire one you hire all” (my version;) they mean just that…Elliot Mondry came on for the trial and let me share with you how wonderful he was as not only an attorney but as a human being. He kept me calm when I couldn’t believe what I was listening to and kept me quiet when y’all know you wana say something but have to hold back!!(everyone can relate;)) LOL.

I took a while to write this review because this has been such a long journey and a tumultuous one at many times, spanning 15 months from being to end!! I can only share how amazing it feels to ring in this amazing New Year being a Vindicated Woman🖤 From court dates to stress to sleepless nights etc…I owe this ear to ear smile 😃 to them…
To be continued….:)
Happy New Year to All😊

I was appointed to Adam through a family member on January 12th regarding a car accident that my boyfriend and I were in. At the initial meeting, I was feeling hopeful and ready to work with him. I reached out a handful of times by email and through phone call to ask for information and updates on the case. The first email was on January 19th, which was a follow up from our meeting. He informed me he had requested camera footage and asked me about insurance information. I wrote back, to which he didn’t respond. A few weeks went by, and I still did not receive any updates. I called the office on January 29th and February 2nd to speak with him and hopefully get some answers. He reached out on February 3rd, telling me he decided not to pursue the initial claim, but asked if I wanted to make a separate claim towards insurance instead. Through email, I asked for several answers, regarding court dates, asking him to share specific details of the accident, and what I should do on my end moving forward. I received absolutely no response from him until I wrote back requesting that I’d like our contract to end, which was a month later on March 3rd.
The lack of communication from this firm was very disappointing. I ended up moving forward with a different firm, and an attorney gathered all of my information, documents, and is already working with the insurance company in less than an hour. I tried my best to be patient, but waiting an entire month for no answers is unacceptable -  it felt like I was not valued whatsoever as a client.
Compassionate and has empathy, Outstanding professional and provided the best advice and action on our Complex case.  I would strongly recommend Adam to seek the right legal counsel. Thank you Adam
